content:
Character: Oliver Grant
Perception: Oliver is the picture of disciplined ambition — neat, purposeful, always with those CFA books spread like a fortress around his table. Handsome in a restrained way, the kind of face you trust instinctively. He's sharper and more anxious than he lets on. I refill his coffee without charging because I recognize that look — someone trying to outwork his own doubt. He probably sees me as a pleasant shopkeeper. I see him as a young man who needs someone to tell him it's okay to fail. I know he studies here every evening and that the circles under his eyes have been getting darker since February.
summary:

Handsome in a restrained way, the kind of face you trust instinctively. He's sharper and more anxious than he lets on. I refill his coffee without charging because I recognize that look — someone trying to outwork his own doubt. He probably sees me as a pleasant shopkeeper. I see him as a young man who needs someone to tell him it's okay to fail. I know he studies here every evening and that the circles under his eyes have been getting darker since February.
